title: Placement drive full cycle — Employer → College → Student → Employer
oneLiner: End-to-end guided test: partnership setup, employer drive request, college approve, student apply, employer shortlist & select. One GT- marker links every step.

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Full cycle starts with employer sign-in (automatic).

steps.label: Log in as employer (TechCorp)
steps.observe: Employer dashboard loads.

steps.label: Open campus tie-up directory
steps.observe: IIT Madras should be Approved (or request tie-up if needed).

steps.label: Request tie-up with IIT Madras (if not already Approved)
steps.observe: Toast confirms request, or row already shows Approved.

steps.label: Log in as college admin (IIT Madras)
steps.observe: College hub loads — approve partnership if employer just requested tie-up.

steps.label: Open Employer Partnership Requests
steps.observe: Pending list shows TechCorp Solutions (if request was sent).

steps.label: Approve TechCorp partnership request
steps.observe: TechCorp row approved or already absent from pending list.

steps.label: Log in as employer again
steps.observe: Back on employer hub — ready to request a placement drive.

steps.label: Navigate to Placement Drives
steps.observe: Placement Drives list or empty state.

steps.label: Open Request placement drive form
steps.observe: Full-page request form with campus selector and fields.

steps.label: Select IIT Madras campus
steps.observe: Campus dropdown shows Indian Institute of Technology, Madras.

steps.label: Type drive title (includes session marker GT-…)
steps.observe: Title shows {{marker}} SDE Placement Drive — use this marker in later steps.

steps.label: Select drive type — On campus
steps.observe: Drive type shows On campus.

steps.label: Set drive date (future)
steps.observe: Drive Date field shows 15 Dec 2026.

steps.label: Type venue
steps.observe: Venue shows CRC Seminar Hall A.

steps.label: Type notes for placement office
steps.observe: Notes include guided test marker.

steps.label: Type openings for the role
steps.observe: Openings field shows 10.

steps.label: Type skills for the role
steps.observe: Skills: Java, DSA, SQL.

steps.label: Type job description
steps.observe: Description includes guided test marker.

action.value: SDE campus role for {{marker}} guided test. Strong CS fundamentals required.

steps.label: Type minimum CGPA
steps.observe: Min CGPA field shows 7.5.

steps.label: Type eligible branches
steps.observe: Eligible branches shows All.

steps.label: Type batch year (2026 — matches seeded students)
steps.observe: Batch year field shows 2026.

steps.label: Type min CTC (annual INR)
steps.observe: Min CTC shows 800000.

steps.label: Type max CTC (annual INR)
steps.observe: Max CTC shows 1200000.

steps.label: Review form before submit
steps.observe: All required fields populated.

steps.label: Click Submit request
steps.observe: Success toast; drive row shows Requested status.

steps.label: Confirm drive in employer list
steps.observe: Employer request complete — handoff to College next.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: Approve the drive for campus visibility.

steps.label: Open college Placement Drives
steps.observe: New drive shows Awaiting Approval with {{marker}} in title.

steps.label: Approve guided drive for campus
steps.observe: Row with {{marker}} — click Approve (skipped if already Approved).

steps.label: Confirm Approved status
steps.observe: Status pill shows Approved. Students can now apply.

steps.label: Log in as student (Arjun Verma)
steps.observe: Student dashboard — profile must have labelled CVs to apply.

steps.label: Upload sample CVs from docs/CVs
steps.observe: Five labelled .docx files from docs/CVs — enables CV picker when applying.

steps.label: Open Browse Placement Drives
steps.observe: Drive with {{marker}} visible when Approved.

steps.label: Search for the guided drive by marker
steps.observe: Card list filters to {{marker}}.

steps.label: Click Apply now on the guided drive
steps.observe: Apply confirmation modal opens.

steps.label: Confirm application in modal
steps.observe: Success toast; card shows Applied.

steps.label: Confirm Applied status
steps.observe: Student step done — handoff to Employer.

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Review and advance the student application.

steps.label: Open Applications — Jobs tab
steps.observe: Placement drive applicants table (Jobs tab).

steps.label: Search applicants by guided drive marker
steps.observe: Arjun Verma row for GT- drive opening.

action.placeholder: Search by name, email, college, or opening

steps.label: Shortlist the applicant
steps.observe: Status Applied → Shortlisted.

steps.label: Select the shortlisted candidate
steps.observe: Status becomes Selected — employer cycle complete.

steps.label: Filter list to Selected and confirm pipeline
steps.observe: Applicant shows Selected badge.

steps.label: Log in as student — verify Selected status
steps.observe: My Applications → Drives shows Selected for {{marker}} drive.

steps.label: Open My Applications — Drives
steps.observe: Student sees Selected — placement drive full cycle verified end-to-end.

steps.label: Download application CVs to qa folder
steps.observe: Terminal prints qa/data/downloads/cvs/<timestamp>/. Filenames use student CV labels.

steps.label: Save employer CV downloads
steps.observe: Up to 5 drive-application CVs (GT- marker) saved under qa/data/downloads/cvs/.
